name: Travados (Honey and Almond Turnovers)
recipeInstructions:
SYRUP:
1/2 cup sugar
1 cup honey
1/2 cup water
Oven: 350°F
Combine oil, 1/3 cup water and sugar; add enough flour to make a soft dough. Knead until smooth. Divide the dough into 35 pieces. Set aside.
FILLING:
Mix together almonds, 1 tablespoon water and enough honey to make a stiff paste. Add cinnamon and cloves.
Press a piece of dough into a 4-inch round and fill with 1 teaspoon filling. Fold and seal. Repeat with remaining 34 dough pieces.
Place on a baking sheet and bake for 30 minutes or until light brown.
To Serve:
Boil travados in syrup (3 minutes per batch). Drain and cool.
SYRUP:
Add all syrup ingredients to a saucepan and bring to a boil.
